# SoCal Web Experts
> Fast, secure, SEO-ready websites and local digital marketing for Southern California businesses.

This site is for local and service-based businesses that need a website that generates leads — not just a brochure. SoCal Web Experts designs and builds custom-coded sites with conversion paths (calls, forms, booking), SEO foundations, hosting, and optional Google Ads / social media marketing.

## Primary pages
- [Home](https://socalwebexperts.com/): Overview of services, process, portfolio, pricing, and FAQ
- [About](https://socalwebexperts.com/about/): Company mission and approach
- [Custom Web Design](https://socalwebexperts.com/services/web-design/): Brand-first, conversion-focused websites
- [Social Media Marketing](https://socalwebexperts.com/services/social-media/): On-brand content and posting
- [Google Ads](https://socalwebexperts.com/services/google-ads/): Paid search for high-intent local leads
- [Portfolio](https://socalwebexperts.com/portfolio/): Example client websites
- [Pricing](https://socalwebexperts.com/pricing/): Setup fee, hosting, and add-ons
- [Contact](https://socalwebexperts.com/contact/): Book a free strategy call

## Business facts
- Name: SoCal Web Experts
- Phone: (747) 221-6603
- Email: hello@socalwebexperts.com
- Area served: Los Angeles, Glendale, Orange County, California
- Starting price: $299 setup + $12/mo or $99/yr hosting
